tasks.title: Workflow profile selector (ChatProfile dropdown)
acceptance_criteria: Profile dropdown appears before first message in a new thread
Selecting CRAG builds CRAG pipeline (logged strategy=crag)
EMA_WORKFLOW_STRATEGY env var still sets the default profile

tasks.title: Model and parameter settings panel (right sidebar)
acceptance_criteria: Settings panel visible in right sidebar after chat loads
Changing model select uses new model for next query (check log)
Changing k slider changes RetrievalConfig.k for next query
Disabling cache prevents cache lookup on next query

tasks.title: SQLite chat history persistence + password auth
acceptance_criteria: Login prompt on first visit; UI_PASSWORD env var grants access
After a query, thread appears in left sidebar
Phoenix tracing and thumbs feedback continue to work

tasks.title: Thread resume handler (on_chat_resume)
acceptance_criteria: Clicking prior thread in sidebar resumes without re-embedding
pipeline and cache session vars set correctly after resume
Subsequent queries in resumed thread work normally
